title: James Burrows, director of classic shows 'Cheers' and 'Friends,' dies at 85
description: Burrows spent his career behind the camera specializing in situation comedies. Few viewers recognized him or knew his name, other than to see it flash quickly on the screen in the opening credits. But they knew his work.

title: Air Force One, gifted to Trump from Qatar, arrives at Joint Base Andrews
description: The luxury Boeing 747, initially valued at $400 million, arrived ahead of schedule on Friday. The jet caused controversy as one of the biggest foreign gifts ever received by the U.S. government.

title: Italy's Meloni, once Trump's closest ally in Europe, says he made up a story about her
description: "Italy and I do not beg," Meloni said in a video rebuke posted on social media Friday. Italy's top diplomat, meanwhile, said he was cancelling a visit to the U.S because of the alleged remarks.

title: Algae clouded Trump's vision for the Reflecting Pool. But scientists aren't surprised
description: The shallow, sunny waters of the reflecting pool are an ideal incubator for algae growth in the summertime. Experts say the recent renovation may have helped accelerate it.

title: US-Iran talks in Switzerland canceled. And, DHS to give police facial recognition app
description: The U.S.-Iran talks that were set to happen in Switzerland have been canceled. And, the Department of Homeland Security has plans to give some local police access to ICE facial recognition technology.
